title: noccaea brevistyla subsp. brevistyla
intro: Noccaea brevistyla subsp. brevistyla, also known as the Short-styled Alpine Pennycress or Short-styled Penny Cress, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). This plant is said to have medicinal properties, specifically as a diuretic, expectorant, and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Noccaea brevistyla subsp. brevistyla include its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Traditionally, this plant is prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
